summary: Completed testing of Infinit-Audit enhancements. Backend APIs 100% functional with all new features working perfectly. Critical frontend login issue prevents comprehensive UI testing. All backend enhancements (UK timezone, company management, user-company assignment, detailed audit view, negative response validation) are implemented and working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login not working with valid admin credentials (admin@infinit-audit.co.uk / admin123)
integration_issues.impact: Blocks all authenticated UI testing and user access to the application
integration_issues.details: Backend login API works perfectly (verified via direct API testing), but frontend login form submission fails to authenticate and redirect to dashboard

passed_tests: Backend: Company CRUD operations - create, read, update, delete
Backend: UK timezone implementation in all timestamps
Backend: Company data isolation (users only see their company data)
Backend: Negative response validation (comments required for fail responses)
Backend: Response group auto-detection of negative keywords
Backend: All authentication and authorization endpoints
Backend: Dashboard statistics with company filtering
Backend: All CRUD operations for audits, response groups, audit types
Frontend: Form fields accept input correctly
Frontend: Page loads and renders properly
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix frontend login integration. Backend authentication API works perfectly, but frontend login form is not properly connecting to the backend or handling the authentication response. This blocks all user access to the application.
